title: pelargonium × saxifragoides
intro: Pelargonium × saxifragoides, also known as Cape Geranium or Mountain Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, native to South Africa. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × saxifragoides include relief from sore throats, coughs, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or flowers in hot water.
